title: FMCG Deal Intelligence Weekly
subtitle: M&A, Investments & Strategic Moves in Consumer Goods

deals.title: Marico Picks Up 40% Stake in Vietnamese Coconut Oil Brand CocoViet
deals.summary: Indian FMCG company Marico has acquired a 40% stake in CocoViet, a Vietnamese coconut oil and personal care brand, for $35 million. The strategic investment marks Marico's entry into Vietnam's fast-growing personal care market.

deals.title: P&G and Dabur Announce Joint Venture for Oral Care Products in Southeast Asia
deals.summary: Procter & Gamble and Indian FMCG major Dabur have announced a joint venture to develop and market oral care products across Southeast Asia. The JV will combine P&G's distribution network with Dabur's herbal formulations expertise. Initial investment is pegged at $200 million.

deals.title: Unilever takes majority stake in Indian beauty brand GlowNaturals
deals.summary: Anglo-Dutch consumer goods major Unilever has acquired a 65% stake in Indian personal care startup GlowNaturals for $450 million. The investment is part of Unilever's strategy to expand its presence in the fast-growing ayurvedic beauty segment in India.

deals.title: Nestlé Acquires High-End Snack Brand Fireside Foods for $2.1 Billion
deals.summary: Swiss food giant Nestlé has completed the acquisition of US-based premium snack brand Fireside Foods in a deal valued at $2.1 billion. The acquisition strengthens Nestlé's position in the growing health-conscious snacking segment. Fireside Foods, known for its plant-based protein bars and organic trail mixes, recorded revenues of $680 million in 2025.

deals.title: PepsiCo and Britannia Industries Form Joint Venture for Healthy Snacks in India
deals.summary: PepsiCo Inc and Britannia Industries have announced a 50:50 joint venture to develop and distribute healthy snack products across India. The JV, with an initial investment of ₹800 crore ($95 million), will leverage PepsiCo's R&D capabilities and Britannia's extensive Indian distribution network.

deals.title: Swiss food giant Nestle announces acquisition of snack maker Fireside Foods
deals.summary: In a major FMCG deal, Nestlé has announced the acquisition of Fireside Foods, a US-based snack company known for health-focused products. The deal size is reported at $2.1 billion and marks Nestlé's largest acquisition in the snack segment in five years.

deals.title: Danone Divests North American Yogurt Business to Private Equity Firm Meridian Capital
deals.summary: French dairy giant Danone has agreed to sell its North American yogurt division to Meridian Capital Partners for $3.8 billion. The divestiture is part of Danone's ongoing portfolio restructuring to focus on premium health and nutrition brands.

deals.title: Hindustan Unilever Announces ₹2,500 Crore Investment in New Food Processing Plant
deals.summary: Hindustan Unilever Limited (HUL) has announced an investment of ₹2,500 crore ($300 million) in a new state-of-the-art food processing facility in Maharashtra. The plant will produce packaged soups, noodles, and ready-to-eat meals, targeting India's rapidly growing convenience food market.

deals.title: Nestle to buy Fireside Foods in $2.1 billion deal
deals.summary: Nestlé SA agreed to acquire Fireside Foods Inc. for approximately $2.1 billion, expanding its presence in the premium snack market. The deal is expected to close by Q3 2026 pending regulatory approvals in the US and EU.

deals.title: Coca-Cola Acquires Minority Stake in African Juice Brand FreshPressAfrica
deals.summary: The Coca-Cola Company has acquired a 25% minority stake in FreshPressAfrica, a fast-growing juice and smoothie brand operating across Nigeria, Kenya, and South Africa. The investment size was not disclosed but is estimated at $50-70 million.

deals.title: ITC Acquires Healthy Breakfast Brand MorningStar for ₹1,200 Crore
deals.summary: ITC Limited has acquired MorningStar, a direct-to-consumer healthy breakfast and cereal brand, for ₹1,200 crore (approximately $140 million). The acquisition aligns with ITC's strategy to expand its packaged foods portfolio, particularly in the health and wellness segment.

deals.title: Unilever Invests $450M in Indian Personal Care Startup GlowNaturals
deals.summary: Unilever's venture arm has invested $450 million for a 65% stake in GlowNaturals, a Bengaluru-based personal care startup specializing in ayurvedic skincare products. GlowNaturals has grown 180% year-over-year and currently operates in 12 countries across Asia-Pacific.

deals.title: L'Oréal Acquires Japanese Skincare Brand HadaZen for $900 Million
deals.summary: French cosmetics giant L'Oréal has acquired HadaZen, a premium Japanese skincare brand known for its minimalist, science-backed formulations. The $900 million deal marks L'Oréal's largest acquisition in the Asia-Pacific skincare segment.

deals.title: Mondelez International Completes Acquisition of Brazilian Confectionery Group DoceBrasil
deals.summary: Mondelez International has completed its acquisition of DoceBrasil, one of Brazil's largest confectionery companies, for $1.4 billion. The deal gives Mondelez access to DoceBrasil's portfolio of popular chocolate and candy brands with strong distribution across Latin America.

deals.title: Kraft Heinz to Acquire Mexican Condiments Brand SaborRico for $180M
deals.summary: Kraft Heinz Company has announced the acquisition of SaborRico, a Mexican condiments and sauces maker, for $180 million. SaborRico is known for its authentic Mexican hot sauces and salsas distributed across North America and parts of Central America.

deals.title: Dabur India Invests ₹400 Crore in Organic Baby Care Brand TinyOrganics
deals.summary: Dabur India has invested ₹400 crore ($48 million) for a 55% controlling stake in TinyOrganics, a premium organic baby care brand. This marks Dabur's entry into the organized baby care segment in India.

deals.title: Godrej Consumer Products to Acquire African Home Care Brand CleanAfrica
deals.summary: Godrej Consumer Products Limited (GCPL) has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire CleanAfrica, a leading household cleaning brand in East Africa, for $85 million. This acquisition will expand GCPL's Africa business, which currently contributes 25% of its international revenue.

deals.title: General Mills Acquires European Plant-Based Dairy Brand OatLux for $320 Million
deals.summary: General Mills has completed the acquisition of OatLux, a European plant-based dairy alternatives brand, for $320 million. OatLux specializes in oat-based milk, yogurt, and cream products and has a strong presence in the UK, Germany, and Scandinavia.

deals.title: Ferrero Group Acquires UK Premium Chocolate Brand Thornton & Moore
deals.summary: Italian confectionery giant Ferrero has acquired Thornton & Moore, a UK-based premium chocolate brand, for an undisclosed sum estimated at £180 million ($225 million). The acquisition extends Ferrero's premium chocolate portfolio in the British market.

deals.title: Pfizer Acquires Biotech Firm GeneCure for $8.5 Billion
deals.summary: Pharmaceutical giant Pfizer has completed the acquisition of GeneCure Therapeutics for $8.5 billion, strengthening its gene therapy pipeline. The deal includes GeneCure's Phase 3 clinical trial candidates for rare genetic disorders.

deals.title: Major FMCG deals surge in Q1 2026!! Check out the hottest acquisitions NOW!!!
deals.summary: The FMCG sector is on fire! Multiple consumer goods companies are making billion-dollar bets. From Nestlé's Fireside acquisition to Unilever's Indian expansion, the deal activity is unprecedented. Click to read our exclusive analysis of every major deal.

deals.title: Church & Dwight Acquires European Laundry Pod Brand FreshPods
deals.summary: Church & Dwight Co. has agreed to acquire FreshPods, a European laundry detergent pod brand, for $120 million. The deal bolsters Church & Dwight's household products portfolio in Europe.

deals.title: Beiersdorf Invests €200M in Sustainable Packaging Innovation Center
deals.summary: German personal care company Beiersdorf, maker of Nivea, has announced a €200 million ($215 million) investment in a new sustainable packaging innovation center in Hamburg. The center will focus on developing recyclable and biodegradable packaging for consumer products.

deals.title: Nestle Fireside acquisition news update
deals.summary: More details emerge on the Nestlé acquisition of Fireside Foods. Sources say the deal includes Fireside's manufacturing facilities in Oregon and Colorado. The $2.1 billion price tag represents a 12x revenue multiple.
